description_long: This object is a rectangular display case with a glass or transparent upper enclosure and a solid base, likely made of wood and metal. The top surface is divided into several sections, each covered with a grid or mesh, possibly for organizing or displaying small valuable items. The base is predominantly gray with a dark brown trim at the bottom, giving it a sturdy and elegant appearance. The transparent enclosure is framed with a dark metal, providing both visibility and security for the contents inside. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, suitable for showcasing items in a retail or exhibition setting. The object appears robust and is designed to protect and present its contents attractively.
description: A rectangular glass display case with a solid gray and brown base, featuring a grid-covered top for organized display. The transparent enclosure is framed in dark metal, ideal for showcasing valuables.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the display case, highlighting the transparent enclosure and grid-covered top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the case and the thickness of the base, with the grid pattern visible along the length.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the transparent enclosure and grid sections from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the depth and structure of the case.
